name: @0xhoneyjar/freeside-activities-mcp-tools
description: Read-only MCP tool surface for the activities substrate. Five tools cover the agent-facing query plane defined in FR-9.

tools.name: get-active-activities
tools.description: List ACTIVE activities visible to the caller's world scope.

tools.name: get-progress
tools.description: Read the ProgressRecord for a (activity, identity) pair.

tools.name: get-badges
tools.description: List BadgeIssued events for an identity, optionally scoped to a family.

tools.name: get-raffle-entries
tools.description: List RaffleEntry events for a cycle, optionally scoped to an identity.

tools.name: list-kinds
tools.description: List ActivityKind discriminants registered in the substrate.
